meta.scenario: house +1 move, faster BPM 136-144, 7.6 BPM gap, intro exit

transition_arc: Faster BPM range (136-144 BPM) — bars are shorter (~1.7s each). T1 has a long outro/intro-type section starting at bar 72 with percussion thinning out. Both tracks skip their silent lead-in bars (from_bar=8). The 7.6 BPM gap is audible but masked by the sparse exit section energy.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 bar 8: first real musical content (bars 0-7 silent lead-in)
annotated_actions.why: from_bar=8 skips T1's 8-bar silent lead-in. Track begins at first drum hit.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 bar 80 (play bar 72 + from_bar 8 offset): section=OUTRO, drums=0.15, harmonic=0.2, rms=0.18 — only hi-hat pattern remaining
annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 8: first music content after lead-in, percussion only
annotated_actions.why: T1 at bar 72 is deep into its outro — kick has dropped, only hi-hat remaining. Very low energy makes this ideal even though the track is not over.

annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 8: first meaningful content — light percussion, no bass yet
annotated_actions.why: T2 from_bar=8 same pattern: skips silent lead-in. drums:0.8 at 136 BPM brings in a hi-hat texture that fills the gap left by T1's thinning drums.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 play bar 80: bass=0.05 (essentially gone), drums=0.08
annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 16: bass just starting to appear (0.2)
annotated_actions.why: T1 bass is nearly inaudible. Swap passes bass ownership just as T2 bass emerges.

annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 24: full groove at 143.6 BPM, bass locked in, RMS 0.55
annotated_actions.why: T2 groove established. T1 fully faded at bar 88.
